title: Far Block Entity Rendering
description: Extends block entity render distance beyond the default 64-block limit
body:
Far Block Entity Rendering

Configure how far block entities render - from 64 to 512 blocks!

🎯 What Does This Mod Do?

Tired of chests, signs, and other block entities disappearing just 64 blocks away?

Far Block Entity Rendering lets you customize the render distance for all block entities, extending it up to 512 blocks (32 chunks)!

✨ Features
  • All Block Entities: Affects chests, signs, beds, banners, and more
  • Performance Friendly: Choose your preferred balance between visibility and performance
  • Configurable Distance: Set block entity render distance from 64 to 512 blocks (4-32 chunks)
  • Instant Application: Changes take effect immediately - no restart required!
  • Easy Configuration: Built-in ModMenu support for seamless in-game configuration
🖼️ Gallery

📌 NOTE

  • Increasing the render distance for block entities may reduce FPS and overall performance.
